Precondition: Both end effectors empty; cup_1 and cup_2 accessible on box_1.
Postcondition: Left end effector grasping cup_1; right end effector grasping cup_2.

Precondition: Left end effector grasping cup_1; right end effector grasping cup_2; table top available for placement.
Postcondition: cup_1 and cup_2 placed on table; both end effectors empty; box_1 top unblocked.

Precondition: Both end effectors empty; box_1 left and right sides accessible; box_1 top unblocked.
Postcondition: box_1 grasped with dual-arm symmetric grasp.
